parameters.query: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active;

={{ (() => { const s = $('Inspect Inventory Schema').first().json || {}; const d = $('Normalize Input').first().json || {}; const b = (value) => value === true || value === 'true' || value === 't' || value === 1 || value === '1'; const hasStoreId = b(s.has_store_id); const hasSku = b(s.has_sku); const hasUnit = b(s.has_unit); const hasCategory = b(s.has_category); const hasBrand = b(s.has_brand); const hasIsActive = b(s.has_is_active); const cols = ["item_name", "price", "stock", hasSku ? "COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku" : "'' AS sku", hasUnit ? "COALESCE(unit, '') AS unit" : "'' AS unit", hasCategory ? "COALESCE(category, '') AS category" : "'' AS category", hasBrand ? "COALESCE(brand, '') AS brand" : "'' AS brand", hasIsActive ? "COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active" : "true AS is_active"]; const where = hasStoreId ? (Number(d.store_id || 0) > 0 ? "store_id = " + Number(d.store_id || 0) : '1=0') : '1=1'; return "SELECT " + cols.join(', ') + " FROM public.inventory WHERE " + where + " ORDER BY item_name ASC LIMIT 500;"; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const d = $('Determine Import Source').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.chat_id || '', message_type: 'text', body_text: d.error_message || 'I could not prepare that file for import.'} }];

parameters.text: Extract kirana inventory rows from this stock sheet. Return strict JSON only in this shape: {"document_confidence":0.0,"quality_notes":[],"rows":[{"item_name":"","price":0,"stock":0,"unit":"","category":"","brand":"","raw_line":"","row_confidence":0.0,"needs_review":false,"review_reason":""}],"invalid_rows":[{"raw_line":"","reason":"","row_confidence":0.0}]}. Use confidence between 0 and 1. If any field is unclear, do not guess and do not output 0 as a placeholder. Put uncertain rows into invalid_rows. Never include markdown.

Read this kirana stock image and return strict JSON only in this shape: {"document_confidence":0.0,"quality_notes":[],"rows":[{"item_name":"","price":0,"stock":0,"unit":"","category":"","brand":"","raw_line":"","row_confidence":0.0,"needs_review":false,"review_reason":""}],"invalid_rows":[{"raw_line":"","reason":"","row_confidence":0.0}]}. Use confidence between 0 and 1. Use only visible text. If price or stock is unclear, do not guess and do not output 0 as a placeholder; put the row into invalid_rows instead. Never include markdown.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Prepare Import Preview').first().json;
const esc = (value) => String(value === undefined || value === null ? '' : value).replace(/'/g, "''");
const storeId = Number(d.store_id || 0);
const summary = d.cleanup_summary || {};
const sessionId = 'inv_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
const jobId = 'imp_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
const status = summary.has_blockers ? 'awaiting_fix' : 'pending_preview';

function jsonLiteral(value) {
  return "'" + esc(JSON.stringify(value)) + "'::jsonb";
}

const sql = [
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_jobs (',
  '  job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  parsed_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  invalid_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  file_name TEXT,',
  '  mime_type TEXT,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_operation_sessions (',
  '  session_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  operation_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  parsed_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  cleanup_summary_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  preview_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
  "INSERT INTO public.owner_import_jobs (job_id, store_id, chat_id, source_type, status, parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json, file_name, mime_type, created_at, updated_at)",
  "VALUES ('" + esc(jobId) + "', " + (storeId > 0 ? storeId : 'NULL') + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', '" + esc(d.source_type || 'document') + "', '" + status + "', " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + ", " + jsonLiteral(d.invalid_rows || []) + ", '" + esc(d.media_filename || '') + "', '" + esc(d.media_mime_type || '') + "', NOW(), NOW());",
  "INSERT INTO public.owner_operation_sessions (session_id, store_id, chat_id, operation_type, source_type, parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json, status, created_at, updated_at)",
  "VALUES ('" + esc(sessionId) + "', " + (storeId > 0 ? storeId : 'NULL') + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', 'inventory_import_preview', '" + esc(d.source_type || 'document') + "', " + jsonLiteral({ file_name: d.media_filename || '', mime_type: d.media_mime_type || '', job_id: jobId }) + ", " + jsonLiteral(summary) + ", " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + ", '" + status + "', NOW(), NOW());",
  "SELECT 'preview_created' AS result, '" + esc(sessionId) + "' AS session_id, '" + esc(jobId) + "' AS job_id, " + jsonLiteral(summary) + " AS summary, " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + " AS preview_rows, " + jsonLiteral(d.invalid_rows || []) + " AS invalid_rows;",
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, sql } }];

"COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku" : "'' AS sku", hasUnit ? "COALESCE(unit, '') AS unit" : "'' AS unit", hasCategory ? "COALESCE(category, '') AS category" : "'' AS category", hasBrand ? const esc = (value) => String(value === undefined || value === null ? '' : value).replace(/'/g, "''");
const storeId = Number(d.store_id || 0);
const summary = d.cleanup_summary || {};
const sessionId = 'inv_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
const jobId = 'imp_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
const status = summary.has_blockers ? 'awaiting_fix' : 'pending_preview';

function jsonLiteral(value) {
  return "'" + esc(JSON.stringify(value)) + "'::jsonb";
}

const sql = [
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_jobs (',
  '  job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  parsed_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  invalid_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  file_name TEXT,',
  '  mime_type TEXT,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_operation_sessions (',
  '  session_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  operation_type TEXT NOT NULL,',

  '  parsed_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  cleanup_summary_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',

  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',

  ');',
  "INSERT INTO public.owner_import_jobs (job_id, store_id, chat_id, source_type, status, parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json, file_name, mime_type, created_at, updated_at)",
  "VALUES ('" + esc(jobId) + "', " + (storeId > 0 ? storeId : 'NULL') + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', '" + esc(d.source_type || 'document') + "', '" + status + "', " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + ", " + jsonLiteral(d.invalid_rows || []) + ", '" + esc(d.media_filename || '') + "', '" + esc(d.media_mime_type || '') + "', NOW(), NOW());",
  "INSERT INTO public.owner_operation_sessions (session_id, store_id, chat_id, operation_type, source_type, parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json, status, created_at, updated_at)",
  "VALUES ('" + esc(sessionId) + "', " + (storeId > 0 ? storeId : 'NULL') + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', 'inventory_import_preview', '" + esc(d.source_type || 'document') + "', " + jsonLiteral({ file_name: d.media_filename || '', mime_type: d.media_mime_type || '', job_id: jobId }) + ", " + jsonLiteral(summary) + ", " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + ", '" + status + "', NOW(), NOW());",
  "SELECT 'preview_created' AS result, '" + esc(sessionId) + "' AS session_id, '" + esc(jobId) + "' AS job_id, " + jsonLiteral(summary) + " AS summary, " + jsonLiteral(d.preview_rows || []) + " AS preview_rows, " + jsonLiteral(d.invalid_rows || []) + " AS invalid_rows;",
].join('\n');
